00062| *

Connected: {address}

00063| * 00064| *
00065| * ); 00066| * } 00067| * ``` 00068| * 00069| * @dev 00070| * - Detects Privy mode by checking if config.privy.appId is set 00071| * - In Privy mode: Uses Privy's authentication flow (social login + embedded wallets) 00072| * - In Wagmi mode: Uses standard wallet connectors (MetaMask, WalletConnect, etc.) 00073| * - Provides consistent interface regardless of underlying provider 00074| * - For Wagmi mode, automatically connects with the first available connector 00075| */ 00076| export const useWallet = (): WalletState => { 00077| const isPrivyMode = !!config.privy.appId 00078| 00079| // Privy hooks 00080| const privyResult = usePrivy() 00081| 00082| // Standard Wagmi hooks 00083| const wagmiAccount = useAccount() 00084| const wagmiConnect = useConnect() 00085| const wagmiDisconnect = useDisconnect() 00086| 00087| if (isPrivyMode) { 00088| // Use Privy 00089| return { 00090| address: privyResult.user?.wallet?.address, 00091| isConnected: !!privyResult.user?.wallet?.address, 00092| connect: privyResult.login, 00093| disconnect: privyResult.logout, 00094| } 00095| } else { 00096| // Use standard Wagmi 00097| return { 00098| address: wagmiAccount.address, 00099| isConnected: wagmiAccount.isConnected, 00100| connect: () => { 00101| // Connect with first available connector 00102| if (wagmiConnect.connectors?.length) { 00103| connectStandardWagmiWithFallback(wagmiConnect) 00104| } 00105| }, 00106| disconnect: () => wagmiDisconnect.disconnect(), 00107| connectors: wagmiConnect.connectors, 00108| } 00109| } 00110| } 00111| 00112| const connectStandardWagmiWithFallback = async (wagmiConnect: UseConnectReturnType) => { 00113| const preferredConnectors = ['injected', 'io.metamask', 'com.coinbase.wallet', 'me.rainbow', 'app.phantom'] 00114| 00115| const connectors = [...wagmiConnect.connectors]; 00116| 00117| // Reorder to put preferred connectors first 00118| connectors.sort((a, b) => { 00119| const aIndex = preferredConnectors.indexOf(a.id); 00120| const bIndex = preferredConnectors.indexOf(b.id); 00121| 00122| if (aIndex === -1 && bIndex === -1) return 0; 00123| if (aIndex === -1) return 1; 00124| if (bIndex === -1) return -1; 00125| return aIndex - bIndex; 00126| }); 00127| 00128| const tryConnect = async (connector: Connector, i: number) => { 00129| try { 00130| wagmiConnect.connect({ connector }); 00131| return 00132| } catch (error) { 00133| console.warn(`❌ Attempt ${i + 1} failed:`, (error as Error).message); 00134| if ((error as Error).message?.includes('User rejected') || 00135| (error as Error).name === 'UserRejectedRequestError') { 00136| throw error; 00137| } 00138| if (i === connectors.length - 1) { 00139| throw new Error(`All ${connectors.length} connection attempts failed`); 00140| } 00141| 00142| await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100)); 00143| tryConnect(connector, i + 1); 00144| } 00145| } 00146| 00147| if (connectors.length) { 00148| await tryConnect(connectors[0], 0); 00149| } 00150| }

metadata.preview:
import { useAccount, useConnect, type UseConnectReturnType, useDisconnect, type Connector } from 'wagmi'
import { usePrivy } from '@privy-io/react-auth'
import { config } from '../config'

/**
 * Unified wallet state interface that abstracts over different wallet providers
 * @interface WalletState
 */
interface WalletState {
  /** 
   * The connected wallet's Ethereum address
   * undefined when no wallet is connected
   * @example '0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f5e8e8'
   */
  address: string | undefined
  
  /** 
   * Whether a wallet is currently connected
   * true when address is available and connection is active
   */

state.title: frontend/src/hooks/useWallet.ts
